validationTracks.name: Corporate Leadership Placement Metrics
validationTracks.description: Non-licensure validation framework measuring career readiness, professional network development, leadership competency, and placement outcomes against the 62% full-time placement benchmark

sections.name: Professional Readiness Index
sections.description: Composite measure of professional skills, personal branding, interview readiness, and compensation negotiation competency. Target: students demonstrate market-ready professionalism before graduation.

sections.name: Industry Network Development
sections.description: Tracks the systematic building of professional relationships including informational interviews, mentorship engagements, alumni connections, and industry event participation. Target: each student develops a documented network of 15+ industry contacts by graduation.

sections.name: Leadership Competency
sections.description: Assesses demonstrated leadership through team projects, organizational improvement initiatives, peer mentorship, and strategic decision-making in applied settings. Aligns with AACSB learning goals for leadership effectiveness.

sections.name: Career Placement Preparation
sections.description: Measures progress toward the 62% full-time placement benchmark through internship completion, portfolio development, interview preparation, and career activation documentation. Tracked longitudinally across all four years.
